scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:bot" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @system-hunter/shared && npm run build -w @system-hunter/api && npm run build -w @system-hunter/bot && npm run build -w @system-hunter/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @system-hunter/shared && npm run typecheck -w @system-hunter/api && npm run typecheck -w @system-hunter/bot && npm run typecheck -w @system-hunter/web
